rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Portugal; Iran deal incremental progress has mild indirect potential for energy prices, but no confirmed outcome.

top_events.title: Iran deal signals: Hormuz reopening and UAE unfreezing Iranian funds
top_events.summary: Incremental steps toward an Iran deal could modestly ease global energy prices, offering indirect relief to Portuguese consumers, but no final agreement is in place.

top_events.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: A geopolitical development within the EU that may have long-term budgetary and structural implications for Portugal as an EU member, but impact is distant and indirect.
